---
title: "Rxperiments"
subtitle: "Personal experiments and learning with pharmaverse packages"
---

## Welcome

This site documents my experiments and learning journey with various pharmaverse packages for clinical data analysis in R.

## Packages Covered

### gtsummary

A package for creating publication-ready analytical and summary tables. Perfect for demographics tables, regression summaries, and more.

### crane

Tools for clinical reporting and analysis.

### Other Pharmaverse Packages

- **admiral** - ADaM dataset creation
- **rtables** - Complex table layouts for regulatory submissions

## About This Site

This is a personal learning resource. Code examples are experimental and may not represent best practices.

## Resources

- [Pharmaverse](https://pharmaverse.org/)
- [gtsummary documentation](https://www.danieldsjoberg.com/gtsummary/)
- [CDISC Standards](https://www.cdisc.org/)
